d: Italian Marxist philosopher, journalist, linguist, writer, and political theorist. Founder of the Italian Communist Party. Developed concepts of cultural hegemony and the role of intellectuals.
s: antonio gramsci early comintern italian marxist philosopher, journalist, linguist, writer, and political theorist. founder of the italian communist party. developed concepts of cultural hegemony and the role of intellectuals. general political theory letters history criticism
